props.name: items
props.description: Array of items to display in the masonry layout. Each item should have id, img, url, and height properties.

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration of the transition animations in seconds.

props.name: stagger
props.description: Delay between each item's animation in seconds.

props.name: animateFrom
props.description: Direction from which items animate in. Options: 'top', 'bottom', 'left', 'right', 'center', 'random'.

props.name: scaleOnHover
props.description: Whether items should scale on hover.

props.name: hoverScale
props.description: Scale value when hovering over items (only applies if scaleOnHover is true).

props.name: blurToFocus
props.description: Whether items should animate from blurred to focused on initial load.

props.name: colorShiftOnHover
props.description: Whether to show a color overlay effect on hover.
